'''Renkov''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] business manager who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He accompanied [[Bria Tharen]] on her trip aboard the ''[[Queen of Empire]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
